The [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] '''XP-291 Skimmer''' was a 6.5-meter long [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]]. It carried one pilot, three passengers, and 10 kilograms of cargo. The speeder had a flight ceiling of 2 meters.<ref name="GG7" />

==Behind the scenes==
The XP-291's appearance was based on old [[V-35 Courier/Legends|V-35 Courier]] concept art made for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']].
